### QA Checklist
- [ ] **Tests Passing:** All automated tests run successfully before merge.
- [ ] **Test Coverage:** PR achieves/maintains a minimum overall test coverage of 70%.
- [ ] **Code Quality:** The code is clean, readable, and contains no unnecessary comments or commented-out code.
- [ ] **Standards:** Commits follow the standard format, and the code adheres to project coding standards.
- [ ] **Vulnerability Scans:** Dependency updates have been checked for vulnerabilities using scanning tools.

### DevOps Checklist
- [ ] **Pipelines:** GitHub Actions automated builds and deployment workflows execute successfully.
- [ ] **Secrets Management:** Environment variables and secrets are handled securely without exposing them in the repository.
- [ ] **Performance:** Automated performance or load tests have not degraded from the baseline.
